title: CITY OF PENDELTON PARKS AND RECREATION - 211info
text: CITY OF PENDLETON RECREATION CENTER CITY OF PENDELTON PARKS AND RECREATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides various recreation opportunities such as athletic programs (youth sports, adult sports, and special needs open gym), fitness opportunities, and community-based recreation at community centers and swimming pools. Also offers drop-in enrichment activities for teens, babysitting classes, and a parent and child toddler playtime two times per week. Operates and maintains parklands, including natural areas, community centers, and hiking trails. 510 SW Dorion Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Office: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Recreation sites: Hours vary Email (541) 966-0228 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 966-0228 Main phone Main phone (541) 966-0228 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service. Scholarships may be available. DOCUMENTS: Varies by program AREA SERVED: City of Pendleton SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-5pm Services: Babysitting Instruction General Recreational Activities/Sports General Recreational Activities/Sports * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Parent/Child Activity Groups Public Parks Recreation Centers Swimming Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - YOUTH PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF PENDLETON RECREATION CENTER
